name: spy-the-lie
description: Spy the Lie by former CIA officers — a deception detection toolkit teaching the CIA method: baseline establishment, cluster analysis, verbal/non-verbal/para-linguistic cues, the bait question, and effective interviewing to detect deception.
useCase: Learn the CIA method for detecting deception — establish baselines, identify clusters, ask effective questions, and avoid false positives.
knownRisks: The CIA method is designed for high-stakes interrogations — not everyday conversations
False positives are dangerous — accusing someone of lying based on incomplete evidence can destroy trust
The techniques require practice and should not be applied casually
